resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def grayCode(self, n: int) -> List[int]:
        return [i ^ (i // 2) for i in range(2 ** n)]
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(2^n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a list comprehension to generate the gray code sequence directly. It takes advantage of the property that the nth gray code is the (n-1)th gray code with a 1 prepended to the binary representation of the (n-1)th gray code, and the (n-1)th gray code with a 0 prepended to the binary representation of the (n-1)th gray code. The expression i ^ (i // 2) calculates the nth gray code from the (n-1)th gray code. This solution has a high efficiency due to its simplicity and directness.
